default.notes: Cascade-first conservative defaults. Activated by /v1/* (no profile prefix) or /p/default/v1/*.

pi.notes: pi agent — main model passes through, tool calls forced to fast tool-capable model, web search has its own model.

opencode.notes: opencode CLI — minimax-m2.7 as main, fast cascade.

hermes.notes: hermes — qwen3-next as main for aux roles.

hermes-bypass.notes: hermes-bp — main model unchanged (caller decides), tool calls forced to owl-alpha (agentic) with multi-provider cascade.

pi-bypass.notes: pi-bp — main model unchanged (caller decides), tool calls forced to owl-alpha (agentic) with multi-provider cascade.

claude.notes: Claude Code via Anthropic Pro OAuth. Opus/Sonnet pass through to Anthropic. Haiku (small tier) silently swapped to openrouter/owl-alpha so the user's Pro quota is saved on menial tasks invisible to Claude Code.

codex.notes: codex CLI — inherits default entirely. Customize as needed.
